thatberd's blog
posts about contact

Blog Instructions

Blog Instructions

Create a new post

  1. Go to _posts/
  2. Create a file named: YYYY-MM-DD-title.md

Example: 2026-04-07-first-post.md

Post template

layout: post title: “Day X: “

  • What I learned
  • The problem -The fix -Takeaway

Publish

git add .
git commit -m "new post"
git push
